items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the 'Service contract integration (parts covered)' requirement. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this requirement has been satisfied. The linked use case mentions the need for service contract integration, but there is no specific evidence demonstrating that this functionality has been implemented or validated in the current saga run.
